empty.title: No payees

form.applyCategoryLabel: Apply this category to existing transactions
form.applyCategoryHelp: Transfers and split transactions are never changed.

merge.title: Merge Payee
merge.transactionCount: {count, plural, one {# transaction will be migrated} other {# transactions will be migrated}}
merge.addAsAliasLabel: Add "{name}" as an alias on the target payee
merge.willAddAlias: Add "{source}" as an alias so future imports auto-match

toasts.transactionsMigrated: {count, plural, one {# transaction migrated} other {# transactions migrated}}

categoryAutoAssign.title: Auto-Assign Default Categories
categoryAutoAssign.howItWorksBody: This feature analyzes your transaction history to suggest default categories for payees. It looks at which category is most commonly used for each payee and suggests assigning it as their default category for future transactions. You can always override the default category if needed.
categoryAutoAssign.minTransactionsHelp: Only consider payees with at least this many transactions
categoryAutoAssign.matchPercentageHelp: The category must be used in at least this percentage of transactions
categoryAutoAssign.onlyWithoutCategoryLabel: Only payees without a default category
categoryAutoAssign.backfillLabel: Also categorize {count, plural, one {# existing uncategorized transaction} other {# existing uncategorized transactions}}
categoryAutoAssign.backfillHelp: Applies the chosen category to transactions that currently have none. Existing categories, transfers, and split transactions are left unchanged.
categoryAutoAssign.viewUncategorizedTitle: View {count, plural, one {# uncategorized transaction} other {# uncategorized transactions}} for {name}

empty.line1: No payees match the current criteria.

categoryAutoAssign.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# payee selected} other {# payees selected}}
categoryAutoAssign.applyButton: Apply to {count, plural, one {# Payee} other {# Payees}}

toasts.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one payee to update

autoMerge.title: Auto-Merge Payees
autoMerge.howItWorksBody: This feature scans your payees and groups variants where one name extends another - for example "Lidl", "LIDL sp. z o.o." and "LIDL WARSZAWA 0421" all build on "Lidl". Each group is merged into a single canonical payee, and a wildcard alias (such as "*LIDL*") is created so future imports are matched automatically. Payees that merely share a common word (like "Royal Electric" and "Royal City Nursery") are kept separate. Review and adjust each group before applying.
autoMerge.backupRecommendation: Recommended: create a <link>backup</link> before making changes.
autoMerge.minGroupSizeHelp: Only suggest groups with at least this many payees
autoMerge.similarityHelp: Spelling tolerance: lower it to also group near-matches like LIDL / LIDI; 100% requires an exact keyword match.
autoMerge.minTokenLengthHelp: Ignore keywords shorter than this when grouping

empty.line1: No merge groups match the current criteria.
empty.line2: Try lowering the similarity threshold or group size.

autoMerge.backfillLabel: Also categorize {count, plural, one {# existing uncategorized transaction} other {# existing uncategorized transactions}}
autoMerge.membersHelp: Select the payee to keep. The others are merged into it.
autoMerge.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# group selected} other {# groups selected}}
autoMerge.payeesMergedCount: {count, plural, one {# payee to merge} other {# payees to merge}}
autoMerge.applyButton: Merge {count, plural, one {# Group} other {# Groups}}

toasts.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one group to merge
toasts.applied: Merged {groups, plural, one {# group} other {# groups}} ({payees} payees combined)
toasts.aliasesSkipped: {count, plural, one {# alias was skipped due to a conflict} other {# aliases were skipped due to conflicts}}

autoMerge.categoryMatchLabel: Only merge payees in the same category
autoMerge.categoryMatchHelp: Keep payees apart when their categories differ, reducing false matches.
autoMerge.ignoreCommonWordsHelp: Don't anchor groups on generic words (Restaurant, Cafe, country names) or words that many different payees start with.
autoMerge.commonWordSensitivityHelp: A leading word is treated as common once at least this many different payees branch off it. Lower = filter more aggressively.
autoMerge.viewUncategorizedTitle: View {count, plural, one {# uncategorized transaction} other {# uncategorized transactions}} for {name}

deactivateUnused.title: Deactivate Unused Payees
deactivateUnused.howItWorksBody: This feature finds payees that are rarely used and deactivates them. Deactivated payees will not appear in payee dropdowns when creating transactions, but their historical transactions are preserved. You can reactivate a payee at any time from the payees list.
deactivateUnused.maxTransactionsLabel: {count, plural, one {# or fewer transaction} other {# or fewer transactions}}
deactivateUnused.maxTransactionsHelp: Only include payees with this many transactions or fewer
deactivateUnused.monthsUnusedHelp: Only include payees not used since this long ago (or never used)

empty.line1: No payees match the current criteria.

deactivateUnused.selectedCount: {count, plural, one {# payee selected} other {# payees selected}}
deactivateUnused.deactivateButton: Deactivate {count, plural, one {# Payee} other {# Payees}}

toasts.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one payee to deactivate

reactivate.title: Reactivate Payee?
reactivate.message: The payee "{name}" was previously deactivated. Would you like to reactivate it so it appears in payee dropdowns again?

aliases.heading: Aliases
aliases.description: Aliases map imported payee names to this payee. Use * as wildcard (e.g., "STARBUCKS*"). Case-insensitive.
